commit.message:
feat: intelligent reminder lead time based on task type

- Meeting/appointment: remind 30 min before (not at start time)
- Payment/bills: remind 3 days before
- Deadline/submission: remind 1 day before
- Travel/flight: remind 2 hours before
- Medical appointment: remind 1 hour before
- Other timed tasks: remind 15 min before
- No time specified: remind at 9am on due date

Also: reminder confirmation always shows actual remind time vs due time

commit.message:
fix prefix-loop spam: suppressed gaps no longer resurface

The loop guard was blocking prefix-doubled gaps but logging them as
failures, causing gap_detector to resurface the same gap every cycle
(spamming Discord with identical blocked messages).

Fix: blocked gaps now log a "gap_permanently_suppressed" success event.
gap_detector recognizes this event and removes those gaps from results.

Also cleaned register_craigslist_dog_price_analyzer from capability
registry and added suppression entries for all register_register_*
variants in the operation log.

203/203 tests passing (+2 new suppression tests).

commit.message:
Add Transformer model, standardize features across all models, make plots public

- Add shared features.py module with 19 standardized features (MACD, BB width,
  RSI, SPY/QQQ context, vol, SMA, lagged returns) used by all 3 architectures
- Add transformer_model.py with sinusoidal positional encoding and multi-head
  attention encoder architecture
- Add aapl_transformer.py and nvda_transformer.py
- Upgrade both LSTM scripts to multi-feature input (19 features) with proper
  train-only scaler fitting, 2-layer architecture, dropout, and early stopping
- Upgrade both RF scripts to use new alpaca-py SDK, unified features, dynamic
  end date, and consistent hyperparameters
- Add save_metrics() to persist MAE/direction accuracy to results_summary.csv
- Update .gitignore to keep prediction plots public, ignore CSVs only
- Remove stale src/outputs/ directory

commit.message:
Fix ATmega328P RAM overflow: PROGMEM controls and streaming INFO_CONTROLS

Move controlDefs, control name/description strings, and enum labels to
PROGMEM. Replace 450-byte stack buffer with streaming sendInfoControls()
using pgm_read_byte/pgm_read_word/pgm_read_ptr for all PROGMEM access.
RAM usage drops from overflow to 52% (1079 bytes), leaving 969 for stack.

commit.message:
Harden session security, fix remaining SQL/XSS, add HTTP security headers

- Session: HttpOnly, Secure, SameSite=Strict cookie flags; regenerate
  session ID on login to prevent session fixation
- SQL: Parameterize AuthTicketController get() and cleanExpiredTickets()
- XSS: Escape id/created/updated in NoteListView; stop leaking SQL in
  exception messages
- Forms: Change NoteFormView from GET to POST
- Auth: Require admin role for database reset
- Headers: Add X-Frame-Options, X-Content-Type-Options, Referrer-Policy,
  and Content-Security-Policy

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix stop gate premature session termination on stale subagents

exit_stop_context() outputs JSON without decision:"block", so Claude
Code interprets it as ALLOW and terminates the session. Stale subagent
cleanup was acting as an unconditional ALLOW, bypassing remaining checks
(task in progress, etc.).

Fix: after clearing stale counters, fall through to remaining checks
instead of returning early. Stale cleanup is housekeeping, not a
stop/continue decision.

commit.message:
feat(mixxx): add Hercules DJControl MIX Ultra mapping (TK-065)

Custom Mixxx mapping for the DJControl MIX Ultra (USB-MIDI mode),
built from the stock DJControl MIX mapping using the djercula project
as the authoritative MIDI reference. Key changes from stock:
- Browse encoder (CC 0x01 ch 0) with selectknob option
- Browse push (Note 0x00 ch 0) as MoveFocus (sidebar/track toggle)
- 3-band EQ (Low/Mid/High on CC 0x02/0x03/0x04 per deck)
- Per-deck shift buttons (Note 0x04 ch 1/2)
- 8 pads per deck on ch 6/7 (expanded from 4)
- Load buttons (Note 0x0D ch 1/2)
- Updated LED outputs using hotcue_N_status (non-deprecated)

Also includes PM tasks.md updates.

exiting to break the loop.

fix: cache provider instances across poll cycles to preserve state

LinearProvider and GitHubProvider were recreated on every pollAll() call,
discarding LinearProvider.stateIdCache each cycle. Providers are now cached
by project path with fingerprint-based invalidation on credential changes.

commit.message:
feat(transport): loopback SSH harness + SSHManager, RemoteRunner, NtmBridge tests

Closes beads: agent-flywheel-console-3qw.6.1 / 3qw.6.2 / 3qw.6.3

All three transport integration tests share a pure-JS loopback SSH server
built on ssh2.Server. No sshd daemon, no root privileges, no VPS required.
OpenSSH 10.0 removed UsePrivilegeSeparation so non-root sshd is not viable;
the ssh2 package's own Server API covers the same SSH protocol surface.

── test/helpers/ssh-loopback.ts (new) ──────────────────────────────────────

startLoopbackSsh(opts) — starts a loopback SSH server:
  - Generates ed25519 host key and client key pair via ssh2.utils.generateKeyPairSync
  - Starts ssh2.Server on a random loopback port (OS-assigned, test-isolated)
  - Authentication: accepts any publickey without fingerprint verification
    (generated pair is self-consistent, ephemeral port unreachable externally)
  - Command execution: spawn('sh', ['-c', command]) in a real subprocess;
    stdout/stderr buffered and written to the SSH channel BEFORE channel.exit()
    then channel.end() — this ordering is required for node-ssh to receive the
    exit code in response.code (the prior pipe() approach closed the channel
    before exit-status was sent, resulting in response.code === null → -1)
  - extraPath option: prepend directories to PATH for fake binary injection
  - restrictPath option: limits PATH to /usr/bin:/bin to exclude host binaries
    (e.g. the real ntm CLI) from the server without needing an explicit exclude
  - Returns: { host, port, user, clientKeyPath, sshConfigPath, flywheelHome, stop() }
  - stop() closes the server and rm -rfs the temp directory

createFakeNtmBin(opts?) — creates a temp directory with a fake ntm shell script:
  - Responds to: list --json, status <session> --json, spawn, send, interrupt
  - Returns JSON shapes matching what NtmBridge's runJsonCommand() parses
  - Accepts override JSON objects for list and status responses

── test/integration/ssh-manager.test.ts (new, 18 tests) ───────────────────

loadSSHConfig() failures (4 tests, no network):
  - Missing yaml file → SSHError("not found")
  - Empty yaml → SSHError
  - Missing required field (port absent) → SSHError
  - Key file not on disk → SSHError("not found")

SSHManager lifecycle (5 tests):
  - connect() returns correct SSHConfig (host, port, user, keyPath)
  - Second connect() is idempotent — same config, no duplicate TCP connection
  - isConnected() transitions: false → connect → true → disconnect → false
  - disconnect() is idempotent — second call does not throw
  - connect() to non-listening port 1 → SSHError within timeout

SSHManager.exec() (6 tests):
  - stdout captured, exit code 0 for echo command
  - stderr separated from stdout (echo >&2)
  - Non-zero exit code propagated (exit 42 → code 42)
  - cwd prefix applied — pwd output contains "tmp" when cwd=/tmp
  - SSHTimeoutError thrown for sleep 30 with timeoutMs:300
  - onStdout callback receives data chunks

SSHManager.getLatency() (1 test):
  - Positive elapsed ms, below 5 000 ms ceiling

SSHManager.stream() (2 tests):
  - Multi-line output delivered (printf alpha\nbeta\ngamma)
  - AbortSignal terminates the stream before sleep 30 completes

── test/integration/remote-runner.test.ts (new, 11 tests) ─────────────────

runRemote() (7 tests):
  - stdout captured for successful command
  - stderr captured alongside stdout
  - Non-zero exit → RemoteCommandError(COMMAND_FAILED) with exitCode and command
  - "permission denied" in stderr → RemoteCommandError(PERMISSION_DENIED)
  - cwd propagated via node-ssh's cd prefix
  - timeoutMs:300 → RemoteCommandError(TIMEOUT)
  - command field on error matches the submitted command string

streamRemote() (3 tests):
  - Yields complete lines from printf output
  - combineStderr:true merges stderr into the line stream
  - AbortSignal stops async iteration before sleep 30 completes

── test/integration/ntm-bridge-runtime.test.ts (new, 11 tests) ────────────

NtmBridge.list() (3 tests):
  - Returns NtmSession array of length 1 from fake ntm output
  - Maps all fields: name, windows, paneCount, attached, agentCounts
  - Empty sessions array → returns []

NtmBridge.activity() status derivation (3 tests):
  - active:true pane → status "active"
  - Same signature across 3 polls (unchanged) → status "stuck" on 3rd call
    (exercises the internal idleSnapshots Map logic)
  - Session with exists:false → returns []

NtmBridge.pause() (1 test):
  - Returns NtmPauseResult with session name from `ntm interrupt` command

NtmBridge.resume() (1 test):
  - Throws NtmBridgeError unconditionally; no server needed

NtmBridge error handling (3 tests):
  - ntm outputs empty stdout → NtmBridgeError("no JSON output")
  - ntm outputs non-JSON → NtmBridgeError("parse")
  - ntm not in restricted PATH → NtmBridgeError (command fails)

supportsResume() (1 test): returns false

── Test summary ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

Total new tests: 40 (18 + 11 + 11) — all passing.
Full suite: 750 passing, 38 skipped (all VPS-dependent), 0 failing.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
Replace SwitchingCostSimulator with animated two-period lock-in game

Replaces the static grouped bar chart with a 3-phase animated simulation
(acquire, lock-in, exploit) showing how firms price below cost to capture
customers then raise prices once switching costs trap them.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Add delegation cache and prepend skill dirs to agent PATH (#184)

## Summary
- **Per-session delegation cache**: In-memory cache keyed by SHA-256 of
`(role, task, return_format)`. Only caches successful non-empty results.
Avoids redundant sub-agent spawns for identical delegations within a
session.
- **Skill PATH fix**: Prepends skill subdirectories to agent PATH in
`wrapper.spawn()` so agents find managed binaries (e.g. `denden`) before
any stale global installs in `~/.local/bin` or `/usr/local/bin`.
- **CLI flag**: `--no-cache-delegations` to disable caching per session.
- **GUI toggles**: Cache delegations checkbox in both ConfigForm
(policy) and LaunchDialog (per-session override).

## Test plan
- [x] 17 new delegation cache tests pass
(`cli/tests/test_delegation_cache.py`)
- [x] 3 new wrapper PATH tests pass (`cli/tests/test_agents_wrapper.py`)
- [x] All 530+ existing tests pass
- [ ] Run a GUI session and confirm `delegateResult` contains text (not
`{}`)
- [ ] Verify cache hit logging appears for repeated identical
delegations

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Replace entry deterrence heatmap with interactive incumbent vs entrant game

Two modes: Manual Play (set limit price, watch entrant decide) and
Auto-Sweep (animated price sweep revealing three regimes empirically).
Includes draggable SVG price handle, entrant decision panel, profit
curves, regime color-coding, and six metric cards.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix candle intro: move script inline so it works before CDN loads

On slow mobile connections, CDN scripts (GSAP/Lenis) block page load for
several seconds. The intro was visible but tapping did nothing because the
event listener in script.js hadn't attached yet. Moving the intro IIFE to
an inline script right after the intro HTML means it runs immediately when
that HTML is parsed, with zero CDN dependency. Also increased auto-skip
timer from 3s → 7s.

commit.message:
Replace BundlingChart with customer-by-customer bundle purchase stream simulator

Rewrites the static WTP scatter + surplus bar chart as an animated
customer arrival simulation. Pre-computes 200 customers via
bundleCustomerStream, then animates arrivals with Play/Pause/Reset
controls and speed selector. Features a WTP scatter plot colored by
purchase decision under the active strategy, three revenue gauges
growing as customers arrive, strategy toggle buttons, and five
metric cards showing cumulative revenue comparison.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

docs(client): update README with project details

Document base template features, setup instructions, and project structure for reusable shadcn/ui template.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

v3.84.0: Enforce minimum delay for Again cards

Fixed both Again card timing issues:

Issue 1 - First Cycle:
- Again cards went to back of queue (overdue cards shown first)

Issue 2 - Second Cycle:
- Demoted cards appeared immediately (sorted by step first)

Solution - Minimum Delay Filter:
- Filter cards by last_reviewed_at timestamp
- Exclude cards reviewed within last 30 seconds
- Applies to ALL cards regardless of learning step

Implementation:
- Added eligibleCards filter before sorting
- Checks: timeSinceReview > 30000 ms
- If no eligible cards, show waiting state with auto-reload
- Auto-reloads every 5 seconds until cards become eligible

Result:
- First cycle Again: waits ~30 sec before reappearing
- Second cycle demoted: waits ~30 sec despite being step 0
- Proper spacing between reviews
- Prevents immediate re-showing

🤖 Generated with Claude Code

Add React Router with protected routes, login page, dashboard, settings page, and auth callback handler.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Rewrite MarkdownSimulator as animated clearance season playthrough

Replace static line chart + table with side-by-side animated
period-by-period comparison of optimal vs naive markdown strategies
using stochastic demand from markdownStochasticSim.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Add futures-combined mode, drop spot as default for all strategies

Spot fees (0.45%/side) are 7.5x higher than futures (0.06%/side). No reason
to backtest or trade spot when CFM futures are available. Added futures-combined
mode (futures-long + futures-short, no spot) to both engines. Made it the default
for Donchian and UAlgo in frontend, backend, and optimizer. Also fixed Donchian
bull filter default to 'off' (was still 'sma200').

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
